---
title: "Cordelia Yonge Steer"
---

## Cordelia Yonge Steer

**Dates:** (b. Jamaica 1887/8)

### Description

cousin of CMY

### Biography

Orphaned daughter of Katherine (Yonge) Steer, she married (1910) Frank Jesson.

### Letters

- Letter from February 26, 1901
- Letter from March 17th [1895]
- Letter from March 17 [1895]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
